posts.author: venu_rajavarapu
posts.community: Manaksia Coated Metals & Industries Ltd - manufacturing & exporting high-quality coated metal products
posts.text: Stock is going down from oct 2025 high of 172Rs. Company has agressive expansion plans. Few of the capacities coming love in q2 fy26. Management said in fy29 with all the capex is in live they can make around 2300 to 2500Cr. Which is 3x more than current revenue. What is could be the reason for stock going down.
